Annotations
Fleet Overview · Summary cards + distribution chart
1
Card grid gap — reduce to 8px
Gap between the six summary cards appears wider than 8px on both axes. Reduce horizontal and vertical gap to 8px to match the spec.
Spacing
2
Card section to chart gap — reduce to 8px
The vertical gap between the bottom row of summary cards and the Fleet Distribution chart should also be 8px. Confirm it is using the same gap token as the inter-card spacing.
Spacing
3
Page header — verify styles against latest design system
The "Fleet Overview" heading and date range subhead need to be checked against the most recent design system iteration. Confirm font size, weight, color token, and line-height are up to date.
Typography
